group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The first experimental arm (SOC + AAP) includes Abiraterone acetate and prednisolone. Abiraterone acetate is an androgen biosynthesis inhibitor. Prednisolone is a corticosteroid. This information is found in the text.
columns.column_name_raw: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
